title: OrderLineItem

donations.description:
The list of donations applied to the line item.

Note: Currently, this array is only returned if the seller chooses to donate a percentage of the sales proceeds to a charitable organization registered with the eBay for Charity program.

feeBasisAmount.description: This amount is the order's total amount and equals what the buyer has paid. This value includes transactions.amount, totalFeeAmount, eBayCollectedTaxAmount, and shipping charges (if any).

lineItemId.description: The unique identifier of an order line item.

marketplaceFees.description: An array of all fees accrued for the order line item and deducted from a seller payout.

description: This type is used to show the fees and donations that are deducted from a seller payout for each line item in an order.
